review_text: I’m a convert. I’ve used oils in my hair before, but I was nervous about using it on my oily skin. I received a sample bottle and found it to absorb beautifully in my skin. I’ve since purchased the large bottle and use it daily in my hair, on my face, neck and hands. I use it under makeup and it applies so much more naturally looking. It creates soft separated waves when applied before using a curling iron. A new staple.

I bought this about a month ago, and I have a noticed a significant difference in my skin it feels smoother it looks clearer. I would take two every night with a sleepytime tea and they go down better than taking it with water. These pills are huge and they stink but i’m not gonna lie these do help so just take your time with them again i’d suggest taking it with a warm beverage to kind of soften it somewhat. Internally body-wise i feel like it makes your body sort of reject junk food because it’s trying to clean your body.
this is super great for chapped lips!!

I purchased this on a whim, I had heard about it on YouTube and just thought I’d give it a try. It is a nice rich emollient salve, I use it on my lips, but I found it is also a great hand moisturizer. My aunt is going through chemo and one of the side effects are dry, cracked, and bruised hands. We were out getting her treatment and her hands started to hurt, I improvised and rubbed the salve on her hands and she loved it. The scent is soft and it soothed her hands. It’s safe to say I will be buying tons more of these tins.
This stuff works really great. It reduces the size with 24 hours. It can dry you out a little but worth it. Also it can only be used at night or when staying home since it leaves a pink residue.

Horrible. My face broke out really bad with cystic acne. My original concern was small clogged pores, almost like whiteheads. Now my face has 4 huge cystic, painful pimples that I have never gotten before. I wouldn’t recommend if you are prone to breakouts. The oil is very greasy and can clog your pores.

I tried this repair balm after receiving my birthday gift of the 2 mini fresh sugar balms. I can’t say enough about it! My lips feel soft and much more hydrated when I wake up. There is a very faint taste of lemon. I highly reccomend it!

As a pharmacist I am naturally squeamish against any product that does not have at least one level of tamper evident packaging however due to the amount of raving reviews I tried to swallow the lump in my throat and go forth with using this cream. Strike was the dispensing mechanism of the jar because of the potential for microbial growth around the opening (I have my bachelors in Microbiology, by which I developed a fantastic case of OCD and know way too much). There is simply no way to keep this jar aseptic, or application microbe-free.Strike three was simply the oiliness of the cream but even with 3 strikes I was willing to stick with it. The dealbreaker was tonight when I saw a piece of black debris in my dispensed pump of cream. Upon sight of this vulgar intruder, I dumped $68 worth of poorly manufactured product in the garbage. It’s a good thing was only a curiosity purchase along with my staple La Mer cream which I will never cheat on again. I’m completely unimpressed and will never speak highly of this brand. Up your product standards, Drunk Elephant.
I am a big fan of Tatcha but this cream is not for me. It’s really greasy and never sinks into the skin. It caused me to have breakouts and I haven’t had a pimple in over a decade.

This stuff calmed my irritated, red skin down, but only to a point. I use fairly gentle cleansers, but something in the tap water tends to irritate my skin. While this seems to calm some of that irritation down, it doesn’t do it to the extent that I’d continue paying for this

I love this product. This is the only face cream that has ever produced noticeable results in my skin. I would say my skin is average- not too oily and not too dry but it does require daily cream.The texture is just right- not too thick and not too thin. It also absorbs quickly.I highly recommend pairing this with Murad’s Age Reform exfoliating cleanser. Your skin will thank you.

I’m sad to say that neither this product nor any of the other products that I was sent by The Nue Co actually made any sort of difference on my face/to my skin. This doesn’t mean it wouldn’t work for everyone. Perhaps I just metabolize these supplements differently than other people. My skin did not look any better, brighter or tighter than it normally looks. These supplements did not make me feel ill or anything when I was testing them out for weeks, so that is a good thing. They are fairly easy to swallow, but I’m also not a stranger to taking capsules of this size. If you do have difficulty with drinking capsules though, these may give you some issues. The only reason I’m giving this product 3 stars is because perhaps it will work for someone else.

Unfortunately I’m not sure how well this works as I had to stop using it because of how it dries. Once on and dried it’s starts flaking off leaving a trail of the sulfur treatment everywhere especially on my clothes. I’ve used other drying lotions from different brands and didn’t find that to happen. I thought about just using it just a night perhaps but I’m just most of it will just ended up on my pillow.

I wanted to like this moisturizer. It has a nice lightweight texture for day time. However, it caused breakouts on me and like another reviewer said it did seem to cause my face to oil up quite a bit by midday. I got this in the Origins Bestsellers kit and so far nothing I’ve tried has worked on my skin. So disappointed!

This smells amazing and is calming. It also has calmed my skin. I have combination skin. It cleans my skin, without drying it out! This is wonderful given that it is winter, and my skin has been so dry. This fixed my skin so far!

This is refreshing but I can’t say it’s much better than a spray bottle filled with your favorite water. The smaller ones are probably a better value at a higher per oz price point simply for the convenience factor.

I’ve been using this mask for a month or two along with other products in the line. It really does draw out the debris from clogged pores. How do I know? After using this mask regularly in addition to my regular routine for the past month or two I now get a bump followed by a white head (a day or two later) and if I can control my hands and keep from popping in a few days the white head washes away or wipes away as I swipe with toner on a cotton round - no popping no dark spots. Normally, I get a giant zit that takes about a week to mature. I can’t wait that long! I pop it and tear up my face in the process. I have oily skin and I’ve used my regular acne treatment with other masks but never saw this change in the way my skin purges. Very good product. And I’ve received several compliments on how clear my skin looks. This line isn’t cheap, but it does work and I’m not left dealing with acne marks. Yay!
Seemed good for the first few days but then was just like any other chap-stick. Might have noticed a difference if I was older and had wrinkles that needed filling up?

I really wanted to love this cleanser, but I am super disappointed. This stuff feels like dish soap AND it has fragrance in it. For reference, I am acne prone with combo skin, and this cleanser made my skin burn. I’m giving it two stars because it did clean my face, and I did notice that my face was left kind of glowy, but it’s probably because of how stripping it is. If you have even remotely sensitive skin I wouldn’t suggest using this product.
I have sensitive, dry skin, and this mist didn’t irritate my skin - but it made me look oily, not dewy.  The mister is good though.
I have combination skin with rosacea. So I need something gentle. You need such a little amount. The smell is light and refreshing. It absorbs so quickly and leaves my skin feeling great.
I love all this Peter Thomas Roth, and this is included. Anti aging properties make me feel better being there, and it doesn’t break me out.

My skin was dry, burning, flaking and I couldn’t put anything on it until someone suggested this and it has completely turned my face around, its lightweight, absorbs quickly and like chugging a glass of water for my face. i wear it morning and night, light enough for applying multiple products and heavy enough so your face feels fully hydrated. Only CON is the price and it only lasts about 1 month, expensive obsession!
This product is great, it actually helps me heal blemishes and prevent for my future breakouts. !!
i feel like i can wash my face better with my hands and it broke way too fast. i dont recommended
I love this face wash!

I did receive this product for free from Influenster in exchange for an honest view. Did I love this mask? At first, I did. It made my skin look beautiful. It was light and hydrating. After a few weeks of using, my face started to break out and basically get used to the hydration. I had to start using moisturizer again in the morning after my showers. Now, I don’t know if that was in part of the weather or not. The packaging is gorgeous and I LOVED the smell. I might try the moisturizer only in the mornings. I did like the way the moisturizer worked into my skin.
It’s straight up face soap and I love it kind of dies out my skin but it really cleans it.
This is the best spray-on sunscreen I’ve used in a while. It doesn’t leave you sticky like the others and, after being in a chlorinated pool, it makes my skin feel moisturized

This is not just some hoax. The “beauty elixir“ is something that is just essential. Its herbs seem to *coax* the radiance from my skin. It’s also great to use (in the bathroom) during airplane flights when the air dehydrates the skin. I love this product.

This product feels really nice - refreshing and smoothing when applied under the eye. I am always a bit bummed when skincare products for around the eye area aren’t also intended for eyelid use, so that’s a downside for me with this product. But primarily, I don’t notice a visual difference between when I do and don’t use this product. So while it feels nice, I don’t see any visual benefits from using it.

I really loved the idea of a gentle lather face wash, but this just dried me out. I have combo skin so I thought maybe this was just my dry skin freaking out, but I tried using a half pump and even that made my face feel tight and chapped. Oh well.

Loving the gel texture, it’s hydrates my dry skin without making it feel heavy. Has a pleasant citrusy scent and  because it’s gel-based, it gives you a cool feeling when you put it on. Which I love, especially in the morning. Makes me feel fresh and ready for the day :)*I received this product complimentary for testing.

Positive - I liked the scentNegative - Broke me out around my mouth. Did nothing for my lips I couldnt already get from other cheaper brands. I was very disappointed as i had not tried anything from drunk elephant before.

I loved and still love some of the LANEIGE prosecutes. Yet this one could be a miss if you are not really looking for anything that’s just good value for the money. It’s more like a toner compare to a moisturizer cuz you’ll still need to use a moisturizer afterwards but can’t be heavy anymore cuz this one contains a bit of the oil in it.

I am in love with this product. I’ve been using it for a few months. It is my must-have product. I have tried so many moisturizers. I have oily skin so I’ve gravitated towards gel moisturizers. Most of the gel moisturizers I tried though weren’t very nourishing, It wasn’t until I tried this that I realized how a gel moisturizer as supposed to be. I am never going back.
I have sensitive dry skin I applied it and felt burning instantly and my face got so irritated and red

This has to be the holy grail of lip balms. I know its intended for men but I Love this stuff (as well as a few of my male coworkers) its smooths my lips without making them peel and the balm is longer lasting than regular chapstick and isn’t sticky. Its just Lovely! I cant wait to try the Vanilla Lavender and the Black tea ones.

I am a huge fan of masks and own a ton of them. I would give this about 3.9 if I could. The packaging is VERY small for the price but the results are not bad. I am not sure if I would repurchase as I have used masks that are less expensive that work just as well if not better.

Its not fancy and does not claim to cure a hundred skin issues. Its an effective scrub plain and simple and very nicely priced. Its a lil minty when appllied so always makes me feel awake after use. Not harsh on my skin and leaves it smooth.

This is going to sound outrageous, but I slathered a sample of this on the other night before bed. I had run out of my usual moisturizer, so I tried this, not expecting anything. I was pleased with the scent and figured I would at least enjoy that aspect of it because products like this never actually work...The next morning, when my mom sees me(I hadnt done anything to my face at this point), she stops in her tracks and immediately asks me what I did to my skin because it looked so moist and glowing!! My mom NEVER comments on stuff like that. I am buying this RIGHT NOW.

I have verrry sensitive skin, so I am always wary to try new products on my face. However, this has been my most monumental discovery since Clinique’s Dramatically Different Lotion years ago. It can take awhile to absorb, so not something I would throw on between a shower and make-up when trying to run out the door. But oh-so moisturizing and lush. Totally in love.
Definitely did not help tame my oily skin. My make up looked like it was sliding off with this primer
Good but didn’t remove mascara well.  Must be more suitable for oily skin bc it seemed drying. Don’t care for the medicinal smell.
I have tried all kinds of lotions and creams but this is the best. Great for sensitive skin. Stays on and clean.
I received this for free thanks to Influenster. I am not a fan and did not notice a difference in my skin at all. I do like the bottle but will not be purchasing this product in the future.

I wanted to love this so bad but it’s not good for my skin. At first it didn’t bother my skin.  Now I’m having a breakout from what I believe is the fragrance. I don’t usually use anything on my skin with fragrance but I wanted to give it a try. She needs a sensitive skin option.

My daughter gave me a sample size of this scrub cream, which she didn’t like. I loved it. (She’s 21 and I’m 50-something and our skin is totally different.) I’ve seen some comments from people who don’t like the slightly waxy feel when they rinse it off - but I really like the way it feels. When the sample was gone, I purchased a new tube from Sephora online. My daughter didn’t know that and gave me a tube of it, along with some other goodies, for Mothers Day. No problem! I use it regularly. Glad to have 2!

Unfortunately I have to give this a middle of the road review. I received this product for free from Influenster for reviewal purposes. I really liked the texture of this product, it was the perfect consistency and soaked into my skin pretty well. I also loved the smell, very fresh! The reason why I am only giving this product 3 stars is because after a few weeks of using this I realized that it was pretty consistently breaking my out. Obviously everyone’s skin reacts differently to products, so this might be for you, it just wasn’t for me.

I’ve read some great reviews on this balm so I decided to pick one up as backup after I finish my Farmacy Green Clean.I love the convenience of using cleansing balms because there’s no risk of the product leaking, it’s very easy to control the amount I want and it travels well (I kept my mini spatula from the DE Slaai cleansing balm). This does take off my foundation well just like any other cleansing oil but I’m unsure for the eyes since I use a different makeup remover.There are a couple downsides to this balm. FIrst, it didn’t come with a spatula. If i didn’t keep the one from my other balm, I could see some annoyance at getting this product out. Second, it doesn’t wash off as cleanly as I had hoped. However, between this, the DE Slaai and Farmacy Green Clean, I would rate this #2. It does wash off better than Slaai but still leaves a bit of slip on my skin. The good thing is, it washes off easily with my Kiehl’s cleanser.

I have fair, sensitive, ruddy skin and this product was awesome. I have tried every brand, whether it was expensive or sold in the drug store. This is the only one that didn’t break me out more before it did the trick. Very pleased and highly recommend it to those who are ruddy red heads like myself.

Way too hard to take my makeup off on my face. Had to rub it on my lips forever to take my lipstick off, and was too scared to put it around my eyes. Kinda felt like it was just moving my makeup around on my face instead of removing it. Ended up just using my regular makeup removing wipe. I did like it for removing lipstick swatches off my hand though.

I have problem skin- acne, hyperpigmentation, rough skin. I’ve used several acne (Murad, Proactive, Obagi) and resurfacing treatments at all price points (chemical peels, microdermabrasion). This product really goes above and beyond. Despite it’s price, I will continue to use this product. It’s virtually eliminated my acne and gives my skin a much smoother appearance! This is the best my skin has ever looked. I even use it on my bikini line and it helps with the ingrown hairs.

Personally not a fan of the pumpkin smell but still wanted to give this a try. The kernels are quite rough on the skin as well. You’re supposed to massage it for a minute when you first apply it but because it’s so rough I couldn’t really massage it for that long. Afterwards it has a warm tingly feeling that does eventually go away. Probably not suitable for sensitive skin. After I wash it off it does make my skin feel very smooth. Not sure if I see much visible difference in brightness though. Won’t return but won’t repurchase either.

Love the texture but very drying. I love how the products texture is and how it transforms from gel to lather when you add water and it does a good job and cleansing the face. However at the end of my cleanse, it left my face feeling a little dry. Hence the three stars. It’s a really nice product but I do think that there are better other products on the market for cheaper.  I don’t know that I would repurchase this.
LOVE THIS PRODUCT! I felt the need to use all cap because this product is all that. A saviour to my dry lips during winter.
Did a good job cleansing my skin, but nothing amazing and I don’t think it’s worth the money

This is one beauty product I swear by because it clears out all the makeup or dirt left in my pores even after washing my face. I use the clarifying lotion on a cotton pad, and after I wipe my face & neck, I can see the stuff that was left in my pores even after using a makeup remover and a separate cleanser.As a related note, I started using BB creams a year ago, and (while I absolutely love the BB creams), I find that they tend to “stick“ in my pores more than my old moisturizer + foundation combo. So I’ve found that the Clarifying Lotion is even more important for clearing out my pores when I’ve put on BB cream.Also, my skin is sensitive & I’m very, very fair, but this lotion has not given me problems.

I’ve spent an unreasonable amount of time, energy, and money on my skin. This is my favorite product I’ve ever bought for my skin. A little goes a long way, so even though the jar is expensive, it lasts a super long time, and my skin always feels moisturized but not greasy, with just the right amount of redness control!
This is a great eye cream. I can feel it tightening when I put it on. It soaks in well and makeup goes on smoothly over it. Its expensive, but I’m very happy with it.

I tried posting a review on this several times and for some reason they’re not posting it. Anyway, been using it since October none stop, every single days and it has done nothing for me. I know my hormonal acne will not be cured but it should at least help with blackheads and pimple control but it does nothing. This is a 1 star review.
best moisturizer with SPF protection I’ve had. invisible, the skin looks fresh and beautiful. It also has alguronic acid that helps skin retain its moisture.
Sat on top of my skin and didn’t notice any difference after using.
Got a sample of this and when I used it once, it was fine. But when I used again, it dried my skin out so badly!!! And it gave me some red spots too so I will not be buying.
No difference in my skin after using it nightly.

I wrote a previous review,not sure what happened why it’s not posted? But I disliked this product so much I had to check if my review posted and I hardly write a review BUT this ! I had to!Basically I was using it for a week I loved it. I even told other friends about it after using it the first few days,which I’m so glad no one bought it because after like 7 of use I started getting textured bumps after a few days of those appearing it turned red and I could very clearly see my pores were clogged because I normally don’t have clogged pores I had it within my cheek area and my jaw a few spots in my forehead. Following that I broke out like it was horrible. I HATE this product and the company has a reputation for doing exactly what it did to me. FIRST AND LAST Murad product I will ever buy IN LIFE! it may work for some but for me it definitely didn’t.

So I got this product with the intention of finding something that would get rid of my past acne scars and it did just that. I’ve been using it for 2 weeks now and my scars are nearly gone. I still have small breakouts but not as intense as before, maybe a pimple or two every few days but that’s about it. It never really did much to my blackheads as they’re still visible but the pores have minimized. The price point may hinder some people from purchasing (it did for me too, as I can’t tell you how many times I’ve added and re-added it to my cart) but you get what you pay for and by that I mean one small pump of the bottle gives your face full coverage (since you only need a small film layer). It may tingle the first time since this is an intensive AHA serum but it’ll go away the more your skin becomes used to it. Try it once a day and gradually increase to twice a day. The best part about this serum is that it’s thin enough to wear under moisturized and makeup!

Even the “temporary results“ mentioned in other reviews didn’t work for me - and bought bottle; been using it for 3 weeks now.37 years old going on 38 -- Thin face .. Maybe it’s because my face is so thin? That might be a factor; few anti-wrinkle creams work on it.. and been trying them since my 20s. 5’2“ and 116 lbs ... Did nothing for my smiley wrinkles; had to turn to other products :(

I’m not sure where I got the idea that Dermalogica products might not be heavily scented? I think maybe due to the simplicity (classic white/black) of the packaging? This oil smelled very strong - not bad, like essential oils, but strong. It also didn’t rinse off completely. I could feel that my skin still had a coating of oil on it after splashing water several times (perhaps a washcloth is required?). Based on reviews here, it sounds like many find it to be a great product, but not for me. Returning.

Love how it’s a foam cleanser so I get the feeling of a deep cleanse!! But how it doesn’t contain harsh chemicals/parabens either. Very effective at cleansing away makeup. I do use this in conjunction with the Clinique cleansing balm (another cleansing favorite!)

It took forever to open this container! Once I did, I wasn’t crazy about the smell, but still bearable. My lips do feel super soft after. I didn’t realize there were tubes/other flavors available. I will like to try the Rose Mandarin Tube one next :D

I really wanted to like it since I got it for free but it made me break out. It smells good and feels good but my skin was so not having it! I would say my skin is more sensitive than average but not super sensitive so just be aware that it could cause breakouts! And I only break out when it’s time for my period or I’m really stressed and this gave me such bad acne :(

RUN if you have sensitively dry skin. I used this Morning and night after I received a free sample, and it actually started to brighten the skin around my eyes. I was impressed and was interested in buying the product. After four or five days, I noticed the skin above my eyelids were starting to become flaky and irritated. The next morning, under my eyes were the same way. Now I have irritated, red, flaky patches around my eyes for the holidays. Granted, I do know that I have sensitive skin and I did begin using this product in the winter when the skin is at its driest, but thought it’d be fine since I have so many hydrating products. Would like to give this product 1 star, but since it did brighten my orbital area, I’ll go with 2 - but beware sensitive skins!

This SPF has worked very well, it feels just the right amount of moisturizing and not too greasy. I have only used it on my face but I like the fact you can really use it all over.  I’m pretty happy with it so far :)

I’ve used a lot of charcoal masks but this is probably the best mask I’ve ever used. It helps a ton with blackheads, acne (esp cystic pimples) and feels really refreshing. would definitely recommend!!

This is by far the best mask I’ve used for my face, especially for my nose area. I have large pores and blackheads on my nose that I’ve been trying to find a cure for. I started using it on my entire face once a week and love the minty, refreshing feel on my skin even after I washed it off. Now I use it on my nose twice a week to clean out the black heads and tighten pores and it works beautifully. Will def. recommend this mask to anyone.

I like this alot. You only need a small bit, dime-size and it lathers up, taking off all makeup. It doesn’t leave your skin feeling dry, but you do feel that clean feeling. I like it because with softer cleansers I have to wash 3-4 times to get makeup off, particularly eye area so ends up being more drying for me. I also have very sensitive, fair skin, rosaceq and I am fine with this.

this product initially made my skin very soft. it took off all the makeup and lathered nicely. it does leave my skin feeling very tight and dry though. I don’t think i could use this on a regular basis, I’ve used it for 5 days once a day and my skin feels super dry and tight. but it does leave the skin feeling clean. just not personally for me.

Having sensitive eyes I had to try this product. I love how it smells, how my skin feels after use. I needed just a tad more to get my eye make-up off to feel clean. All areas of my face felt completely cleansed and soft!

This has a nice texture, sinks in well and provides good hydration without being sticky. but it does nothing for dark circles. There are probably cheaper eye creams that do the exact same thing. I’m not sure yet if I’ll repurchase. I prefer the pump format to squeezy tubes/tubs which is the usual format for eye creams.

This is nice but i’m not blown away with anything noticeable its just a nice creamy serum that soaks into my skin. It doesn’t add any noticeable shine or glow or any shimmer. I was hoping for more with this product not sure what the point is which is why i’m giving it a 3 star. Its also expensive and not a necessity for my skin care routine.
This is a classic, moisturizing lip balm that is my go-to product! I can never get enough. Definitely a must-have. Love it.
This product is way over priced.  Found it to be ineffective and completely irritated my skin and my skin isn’t particularly sensitive either. I wouldn’t recommend this.
This toner makes my skin feel very oily after using it. It has a lotion texture that I don’t really like. Kind of heavy for a toner. Reminds me of a bad moisturizer

I am a huge fan of the Sephora brand eye masks and am also a big fan of Tarte so I was very excited to try these. The pack contains 4-sets of eye masks for $22, which I believe actually comes out to $2 cheaper than if you bought 4 of the Sephora eye masks. However, these did nothing for me. I put them in the fridge (as noted on the packaging) and tried them twice- no noticeable difference. I will keep using the Sephora masks and let friends have the remaining two packs. Please try again Tarte!
Quite drying. Would not recommend for older skin. There’s no advantage other than cleaning well.  It strips your skin and makes it very dry. Counter-productive.
Made my acne scars sooo much lighter. Bought the bigger container too because I loved it so much
I love the flavor. Really good lip gloss.

I have combination skin and struggle with adult acne breakouts. The first time I used this cleanser as part of their 3 step package I used all 3 steps, twice a day and I broke out like crazy!! I decided to try it again and only used it once a day in the morning and used a more natural, gentle cleanser and moisturizer at night and I’ve seen a big improvement in my acne
LOVE this, have used it for year. A relief for dry lips and I also use it on my skin when I have a chaped nose from a cold...
this is great! i always found that i could feel when i was wearing sunblock on my face, and this just blends right in, no oiliness, as if i have nothing on my face.
Not a big fan. Wouldn’t Recommend use in the winter. A nice pretty gloss but not for hydration purposes. Does smell nice.
I received this product complimentary from influenster. I wasn’t a big fan of the extremely scented perfume smell. It was fast acting and absorbed well.
Leaves my skin so soft and fresh use to have a bit of dryness and this worked so well...... Will purchase again !

This moisturizer is great for normal and combination skin, haven’t tried it on oily. I’m taking one star off though because it smells bad, like chemicals :/ but it’s a great daily face moisturizer! It makes my skin feel silky soft and not oily or greasy!

I have combo skin with acne, and my skin is also super sensitive. I was using some products recommended by my doctor to help control my acne but my skin sensitivity started and had redness all over. I had been using a new moisturizer that wasn’t adding enough power to counter act the dryness provided by the regimen. I have had the mask laying around, and used it on occasions but decided to add it to my nightly routine hoping it would help control my redness and irritation. This new step has completely changed my life, after three days the redness and imitation were gone. I put a layer at night and sleep on the mask. in the morning my skin feels hydrated and calm, no extra oiliness has occurred and know I simply have my normal acne.
It is wonderful! Makes your skin feel hydarated and smells clean.

I love love love so far! It smells wonderful and I have never seen my sink so dirty in my life. Well actually at all. I’ve used several types of cleansers, top shelf and drugstore. I didn’t realize how much makeup was still on my face till I used this. My sink was covered in foundation. I’ve been breaking out lately and I can already tell a difference and I’ve only used it twice. 10/10 would recommend.

I received this product as a free sample from the Influenster Origins Wake Up box! And I think I am hooked honestly. The product smells amazing (doesn’t taste great from getting some in my mouth accidentally) but also does not irritate my sensitive skin causing a rash or a break out. it has even cleared me from my recent small break out. And I love the texture of the scrub on my skin they’re my favorite face washes it feels like your cleaning up your impurities of everything you left on your face from the whole previous day.

I had high hopes for this cleanser but I’m not really impressed. First of all, I hate the smell of all the MB products they all smell like a really fake botanical perfume and that’s just not my style. Second, this doesn’t work AT ALL with a Clarisonic. I realize it’s not sold as a foaming cleanser but it falls so flat on my Clarisonic I feel like I’m just pushing the brush around my face. I think it might be helping me recover from a hormonal breakout — I can’t tell if my skin is just balancing out after my body being back to normal (until next month) or if this has helped or at least speed that process up. TLDR: I’m not going to buy this again, especially because of the strong fragrance that I don’t like.

big jlo fan, & I like most of the skin products in the line and will continue to add them into my routine.  However, The Blockbuster is one I could only use once, just a dab, because the perfume was well overpowering and lingers hours for me.  I hope she adds a cream option that doesn’t have fragrance or a chemical sunblock ingredient, then I could stick with and build the benefits ;)

I’ve heard so many good things about it.And it truely deserves them.My best lipbalm ever!It’s not super sticky!I don’t feel like it’s hard to openSometimes it is but only my hands are wetBut it doesn’t matter to me.Good quality good price good design pefect!I’ll absolutely buy it again

I was over the moon to try this product as I am experiencing extremely dry skin and have been on the hunt for the best moisturizer out there and trying many of Sephora’s best sellers. This is by far the worst and GREASIEST moisturizer I have ever used. My first surprise was that this was scented, in a light perfume scene as opposed to something clean and fresh. It sits on top of my skin in a layer of grease and NEVER absorbs fully. If I wipe my fingers across my skin even thirty minutes after I apply this moisturizer my fingers are shiny and full of oil. The one star I rated third was for the packaging because it is beautiful Looking. If you are looking for a moisturizer OR a primer this is not it. Don’t waste your money. The name of this cream is misleading and This to me is an extremely low quality moisturizer in which does not leave my skin feeling plump and moisturized like many many other products. I hope this helps another beauty insider xoxo
Product is ok but the packaging kept making the product explode- passed the return date so i ended up throwing it out.
I have sensitive skin so I focus this on my t-zone. It cleans my skin without drying it out. This is my new favorite mask.

Y’all. I love this stuff!!! I’m slowly making the transition to all natural products and being more ingredient conscious and this takes the cake for cleansing balms. It leaves my skin feeling soft, clean and not tight or too dry. It also smells like key lime pie??? Like no joke. I find the best amount is just picking up the amount of the end of the stick it comes with. You really don’t need much!
Leaves your skin orange and smells really gross. Returned the next day.

PROS. I have sensitive skin that tends to be on the dry side. I received a free sample of this oil and Became a fan. I add a couple of drops of the oil to my daily moisturizer and it gives my skin a subtle glow. It doesn’t clog up my pores. It is also better than the other (pricier) oils I’ve tried out, except Rodin’s Olio Lusso, which is my ultimate favorite face oil.CONS. The smell isn’t great (but at least it’s subtle).

This is a well priced product with amazing results. It’s not your typical toner because it’s not harsh or drying. It’s clarifying, refreshing and makes your skin feel cool. Not really a lotion, so I’m not sure why it’s called a lotion but I would pay 3 times the price for this product. It is my favorite part of my skin care regimen!
Amazing product. Made my skin feel so nice and not greasy. All the reviews are mad because it doesn’t control oil - it’s not marketed to control oil. It’s just a moisturizer.
Love it. Smoothens my skin and evens out my tone. All natural, to boot.

I sometimes use other products when I’m unable to get to the store to buy All About Eyes but nothing compares. This is, by far, the best under eye product I’ve used. I do have circles but that isn’t why I use this; I use AAE because it moisturizes unlike any moisturizer and keeps my eyes looking fresh all day. Highly recommended for age prevention, fine lines, and moisture!

This is a great cleanser. It is on the expensive side but it lasts forever. It is creamy yet exfoliating at the same time. It is gentle enough to use every morning in the shower but sometimes I only use it a few times a week. It never dries out my skin and is safe for sensitive skin as well. It never leaves my skin red like some exfoliators. My skin is soft and dewy after I use this.

I cannot live without this amazing little bottle of skin perfection. I originally bought it because I was having a cystic acne episode but this stuff changed my life! It has completely transformed my skin in the best way possible. Not only did it clear up my acne, but it also got rid of old acne discoloration, reduced fine lines and wrinkles and gave me the glowing complexion I have always dreamed of. I swear that everything I buy from PTR is amazing!! I use many of his products and all of them are life-changing. Please do not ever do away with this product!!!

I got the smallest bottle of this in one of my ipsy bags. I love this Oil! It’s very thick feeling & not runny and super greasy feeling, which I love! I wash my face, & do the rest of my cleansing routine, then Serum & moisturize.. at the very end I put this oil on top as my last step to lock in all of the moisture :) love it! This tiny little bottle will last me a long time, the formula seems very concentrated which is awesome.

Pros: gentle, lightweight; Cons: if you wear heavy makeup, using this might not be enough. I tried to remove my eye makeup with this cleansing oil, but it burns my eyes. Normally I can use almost any cleansing oil around my eyes without any problem. I love this brand and have some of the favourites, such as that Omega rich facial cream. This one though, I had to return it sadly.

Being a fan of the original argan oil (the one that came in a tube), I really had high hopes for my jar of whipped argan oil face butter. But something strange was happening after I applied it on my face. After a few seconds of rubbing it on, it would flake off; the “flakes“ looked a lot like eraser flakes after you’ve erased something on paper. I thought it was the combination of the serum I was using before I put on the face butter, but after a week of trying it on with just a clean face and nothing else (no primer or serums or anything beforehand), the butter still flaked. So I just tossed it. Super disappointed and don’t think I will buy this again.

It’s light and goes on smoothly, but it leaves an oily sheen, and didn’t help my fine lines or puffiness at all. For $30 it is definitely overpriced for basically a tiny moisturizer. I will not be repurchasing it.

I am not one to throw around 5 stars. But I got the trial set on a whim just wanting try something new. Not too sure about the cleanser, it seems very average to me--maybe I’m wrong I’ll keep using. But this moisturizer is the diamond of this collection. Usually gel moisturizers like this pill when I apply makeup and don’t actually absorb the skin, just laying on the top layer (i.e. The pilling issue) but this one is interesting, it absorbs and dries to a satin finish, not too greasy or heavy but definitely not dry matte. I started using it at night initially because I was out of a night time moisturizer but then I noticed how amazing my skin looked when I woke up and realized it’s not a super heavy duty cream and might dry down nicely for makeup application, and I was so right. Ladies if you’re dry or combo, try this out during the day, my makeup never applied so evenly. Also this leaves your skin feeling soft and smooth, definitely will repurchase once the trial size is all gone.

I am typing this after I’ve spent the whole day in years and spent $780 at my derms ofc. Have pretty good skin, a little acne prone but that was under control, hadn’t had a bad breakout in about 3.5 years. That’s probably when I decided, hey, why not give this a try... oh boy. Started breaking out almost immediately. Thought I was perhaps going though a purging phase and decided to give it 6-8 weeks. Well, two months later and I have the worst skin I’ve had in my life. I’m considering going on accutane. Have completely ruined my skin, and I’m mad at myself for wanting to believe and not realizing sooner how much damage I was doing. Hope it’s not too late to repair it.

I got this in a 1oz sample when este Lauder had their free gift bag special. I have never used a soap that made my face feel so smooth and clean as this product does and my face looked so much brighter and clearer! I had to see if sephora carried because I love their samples and deals. I also loved that this soap lasts a long time. A little goes a long way. My 1oz sample has lasted almost a month even though I used it twice a day.
I love this product, I went in for a makeover and the Sephora rep used this product on me because I had a pimple and when she was done you couldn’t even see the pimple. Luv it!

I don’t know how anyone enjoys this mask...it does not absorb into the skin at all. It’s says just to “pat it in with a warm cloth if necessary - no need to wash it off!”. If you do that it just pills up on your skin.

i actually paid full price for this and didnt get given it for free for a review (which is why theres so many positive reviews). this was the biggest waste of 25.00. its not worth it at all. i have tried just about every lipgloss. i love a good thick high shine gloss. the packaging is pretty, but the product is terrible. its glossy which i like but its more on the oily thinner side which i dont mind but the problem is it leaves a ton of white goopy residue inside the lips which is super noticable when you talk. please do not buy this product and get the refy lipgloss instead (super high shine and not goopy). i usually love kosas but this was just terrible. i wouldnt even pay $10 for this.

I have oily combination and acne prone skin, and this product worked miracles on me. I’m 21 years old and have been suffering from acne and acne scars since puberty hit. My pores look smaller, my scars have faded and I have not had a breakout since I used this product (2months). Would recommend! But be sure to try out a sample first!!

I’ve used a bunch of the Tan Luxe products but unfortunately this one made me break out bad on my backside. Once the breakouts were all gone I tried it again and broke out. I didn’t want to believe it was this tanner so I tried it again and broke out again...so far only product from Tan Luxe to make me break out. It sucks.

I bought this because of an Instagram ad! I like the ingredient story but it wasn’t a standout when I applied. I didn’t notice any changes. This is a somewhat heavy cream - not really whipped like I’d have hoped.

I have been using this product for years and seen wonderful results, significantly lessened dark circles and gave an overall brighter more awake look to my eyes, however......about 6 months ago i discovered that i am allergic to milk protein, and have cut all milk products out of my diet. Now, the last few months ive noticed i get very red itchy eyes when i use the product, it finally dawned on me to check the ingredients and it contains both milk and whey protein. Since there is no other dairy products in my system anymore, now any little bit is extremely noticeable! Moral to my story - if you gave milk allergies, stay away from this product! If you don’t, then buy it, it’s amazing!

I’m only giving it 4 stars because I have only used the sample I received in the Hydration Pack. I loved this - I don’t recall a lingering or odd smell. I got about 4 uses out of my sample and noticed immediate results. Can’t say I’m going to spend this kind of money to actually own it though :(
I love this product, my favorite face cleanser ever!!!

I bought the $22 sample size because I didn’t want to spend $78 to test the product. Omg! Let me tell you, my skin was immediately smoother, softer, and had a beautiful glow after just one use. It may be pricey, but a little goes a long way. I’ve used this 5 times already and barely made a dent in my 0.5 oz tube. I highly recommend this. I also follow up with the PTR laser resurfacing serum, then the PTR spf face lotion. It has made an amazing difference. I used to think all face products were the same, but I truly believe that if you want amazing results, you need to spend a bit of money. You cannot put a price on beautiful skin.

I used the entire bottle and did not see any results. I applied it every morning on lids and undereye before eye cream and my eyes look the exact same. Maybe its good for prevention but not correction.
Cute packaging but the honey whip had no seal and was basically empty
I don’t know if I actually have Rosacea, but I had definite areas (cheekbones, the eye area) that were redder than the rest of my face. This cream actually has made the redness nearly disappear.

The smell is amazing but I don’t feel like the product is worth the hype or price. I appreciate that its a clean product and the smell but I don’t love the heavy smell around my eyes and being as sensitive as I am I didn’t find the results worth it.

Up until about 2 years ago, I didn’t moisturize my skin because I didn’t realize how much it would help. I just thought my skin was how it was and moisturizers always made me break out. I’ve tried one of the Sephora brand moisturizers (my skin really hated that), I tried the Organics line for sensitive skin (that also broke me out and leaves my skin feeling oily the entire day).I tried this product with my points on a whim last month, and I am so so so pleased! It is amazing. I use it every night after I wash my face and every morning after I wash my face. It smells great, it feels so smooth going over my skin and I rub it down my neck a little ways too.For me personally, it absorbs very quickly. I am able to immediately start putting on makeup for the day. After I wake up in the morning my skin doesn’t feel oily and it’s so soft from being soaked up all night.I didn’t notice my skin breaking out after I started using this at all. I’m not saying it cleared my skin either, but perhaps the fact I found a moisturizer that worked and actually used it every day has helped since I have had no notable brake outs.Love, Love, Love. I cannot say enough great things about this. I’m planning to buy the larger size soon!

I’ve been using the Clinique 3-step acne solutions system for 3 years. Of all the treatments I’ve tried since I was a teenager, this has worked the best. Before Clinique, I found that leaving on products with benzoyl peroxide as the active ingredient throughout the day made my skin less shiny, but they could be drying, and it felt dumb to buy and use two products (acne treatment and moisturizer) to put all over my face. This combines the two--you don’t want to put it on sensitive skin, like around your eyes, but for someone with oily skin, it does moisturize enough that you don’t need an additional product. The results aren’t magic--I still use 3 oil blotting sheets mid-day, and my pores could be smaller, but using the full system everyday, I don’t have bad breakouts. I think that’s the best someone with poor skin could hope for.

I reviewed this a couple months ago; I praised it then & I will praise it now. I bought this in February when I was at wit’s end about my adult acne, the bane of my existence. Well, it turns out 3 months later & this product is just as amazing. It was not a fluke. I use this every night. I use it sometimes in the day, but mainly I use the spf 40 Josie Maran product. I also use the argan oil stick as a spot treatment. Nothing has ever worked for my skin the way this does. It makes me glow. I went to the dermatologist for some back issues & of course they were like... use this cream on your face. It made me break out worse. I didnt think I even needed anything for my face; I am sure he wanted my money. Regardless, the argan oil re-brought my face back to life. It is the best product I have ever used.

It’s difficult for me to believe that so many reviewers disliked this product because of the applicator. It was the applicator that convinced me to make this purchase!Here’s how I apply this serum:1. If you ’swirl’ the applicator as you’re withdrawing it from the bottle, it will remove most of the product off the applicator so you don’t end up drowning your eyes in serum.2. Using the tip of the applicator, gently massage the skin under your eyes in tiny circles, starting from the inner corners to the outer.3. Gently pat the remainder of the serum into the skin. I also end up applying some to my eye lids and lash area.I do this every morning and night. The applicator tip is ALWAYS cold and thus reduces my under eye puffiness greatly (which is a miracle after night shifts). The serum itself is nice and light, and absorbs very quickly. I found that with this product, my under eye puffiness was gone and the skin under and around my eyes was smoother, brighter and healthier looking. Oddly enough, I even noticed my lashes looked longer and stronger after using this for a few months, weird.While this product didn’t diminish my dark circles entirely (I’ve given up on that hope), it does moisturize amazingly and is a great prophylatic measure against wrinkles and anti-aging. I would definitely repurchase when I’m out of this product and recommend it to anyone who wanted a great under eye serum.
I wanted to love this so bad because it felt so good to wash my face with this product￼. Unfortunately, after about a week of use, I started to get little bumps along my jaw.

Trying thus for free in exchange for my honest review.I’m sticking with medicated chapstick for my “overnight mask“. This stuff was just ok. Thin, smooth, slight noxema smell to it (very faint clean menthol) but absolutely nothing to write home about. I didn’t feel overly supple the next morning and didn’t have any other long lasting effects the next day.

I will say I love how it leaves my skin and eyes feeling hydrated and refreshed but as far as removing my eye makeup it’s def a struggle. I feel I’m having to really work at it and really rub hard when the label says no rubbing or tugging :/ I have used other products before that works much better unfortunately
It broke me out drastically, gave me tiny little white bumps all over my face. I really wanted to like it but it just didn’t work for me.

I was so excited for this product based on the reviews I read here. However, it did absolutely nothing for me. I’ve tried it several times now and unfortunately it did nothing for me. Do I have a defect? Doesn’t seem consistent with all of the other reviews...

I purchased this as I felt I needed to get in gear on adding some anti-aging steps to my routine. and I love it. I did not experience the break-outs some do at the start but it makes sense for your face to get used to something. I feel like my skin looks plump and smooth with regular use. And one little pump does my entire face. It’s expensive but I have no complaints about my face thus far. The one thing I have noticed is some discoloration to my pillow. I put this one well before bedtime now in hopes that it will be absorbed and not stain my pillows any further. Otherwise, great product, love it!

I received this as part of my birthday gift and after the first use I knew I’d buy the full-size (though pricey). My oily acne-prone skin immediately took to the mask and my large pores closed right up! My skin responds well to more natural ingredients and this rose petal and rose water infused mask is a true testament to that. Great product!

HONEST REVIEW DONOT WASTE YOUR MONEY PLS!!! I got this few days back when it was on sale, read the reviews and bought it but it does nothing except makes your face red!!!! I am returning it. IT IS SUCH A WASTE

Did not work for my acne-prone, combo skin. Clings too much to dry areas, very thick and hard to spread evenly with brush or fingers. It does have some CC power, but not enough to justify the price. I don’t know if it caused new breakouts, but I felt it was too thick.
Love love love this balm. Hydrates my lips and gives a light rose look and what’s left goes on my cuticles.

I love this salve, I use it everyday and it makes my lips soft. I use it on its own or under lipstick and I love the look of both. It is very moisturizing and smells nice but for me one tube barely last two months.

I have extremely sensitive rosacea prone skin. Most skin care products irritate my skin including cleansers. I received a deluxe sample of this cleanser and was so impressed with how my skin felt that I ordered the full sized one. Two months on and it is still the only cleanser that I use! It leaves my skin feeling soft and not dry. I highly recommend this!!
I was not impressed with this product. I had hight hopes but was a bit disappointed

It’s not hydrating for me at all, I wanted to get the erno laszlo one in store but that store didn’t have them, so the sales recommend me this one, she told me they are the same...well, no. And it’s too hard to apply on face.

is Fenty targeting rich 12 year olds? this stuff smells like a mixture of cotton candy and bubblegum. it foams up lots, you only need a small amount. performance wise I think it works well, does not over dry the skin. but the smell... impossible.

I love the Luna night serum so I bought the duo. I use the good genes but I’m not a huge fan of it. So I would say this is a good value to try it out but I find the good genes a bit greasy/sticky and even though I am not at all sensitive to smells and I use a lot of natural face and body products that are strongly scented with no issues, I HATE the smell of good genes...it reminds me of stale urine or something. It doesn’t seem to help the appearance of my skin either
Best moisturizer ever! I used to have dry patches on my face, but this has changed my skin. If I could give it more than 5 stars I would!!!

I was really excited to try this but the smell is way to strong!! It definitely has a smell of pool water/ chlorine or bleach to it. Which suck because I really wanted to love this product since I have acne prone skin :(

I tried this as part of the Double Cleanse regimen and really wasn’t a fan. I have oily skin and this made my skin feel gross. It does remove makeup but so do other products that I like. For the price, I expected more even though it is a mini size. I wasn’t a fan of the second cleanser “Special Cleansing Gel” either. I loved the Multi-Active Toner spray however. I bought all three because I wanted to try this brand out. At least I found one good one out of three.

This does effectively blur imperfections and it made my skin look great. However, you can’t put anything on on top of it at all, not even a setting powder, or it pills like no other. Rubbing it on vs. patting it on makes no difference in the pilling. It pilled even when I applied powder partway through the day. I wouldn’t recommend it unless you don’t wear any face makeup at all.

The light texture absorbed quickly and my skin looked decent, but it didn’t exactly wow me. I felt like a thin layer just wasn’t doing much in the moisturizing department—which, apparently, I later learned, isn’t even what The Cream claims to do. It’s more of an overall skin rejuvenator which isn’t worth it for the price.

I have been dealing with dry patches on my face for 8 mos and this is the one product that makes it feel good. It goes on very creamy and is not oily, makes a great moisturizer that I even gave my sister a sample and she loved it.
Miraculous, amazing overnight zit killer. It is not real pretty when applied and is slightly sulfer smelling but it is gentle,non irritating and super effective.

I love Tatcha products and was excited to give this a try. Unfortunately I can’t get past the extremely thin, watery texture. I guess it’s because of the inclusion of the hydrating elements. It’s hard to control the amount of product that comes out of the bottle. I have enjoyed a couple of days of sun with no ill effects, though, so it seems to work. Overall, it isn’t worth the expense of this product to add the hydrating elements in a sunscreen that I am already using earlier in my skincare routine.

Broke out all over my chin area. I usually don’t have pimples/acne. Realized it was this oil. I have been using this at night after my usual toner/serums. Then I apply this as my last step. Nothing more. Been using this about two weeks now. Sadly will have to return it. It really calmed down my redness. Very moisturizing. I would wake up to glowy broken out skin though.
Soo I been using the serum and the oil mist.  The only thing that is happening with a sunless tan is the scent.  I don’t see any gradual tan, just the scent of a sunless tanner.
A Sephora employee recommended this along with Kate Somerville Acne Wash, my breakouts are still terrible and this expensive $$$

Okay, I’ve come to terms with the fact that I hate this sunscreen. I don’t like the consistency, it goes on greasy, it’s hard to put makeup over, and sometimes it’s a little irritating to my skin (baffled by that. Use tons of DE products with no problem.) I got this and it smelled heavenly ! I used it and wow my lips the next morning were baby soft and every time i use it i notice my lips just getting softer and softer and I LOVE THAT ! I honestly think the price isn’t even that bad and how much product you get is great for a lot of uses ! Love this product ! Also, I saw someone else post that how expensive this is , if you go on the actual website it has the same price ! Someone needs to know how to use the web !

I bought this product because most sunscreens irritate my under eye area. This one didn’t but if you already have a sunscreen that works for you and that doesn’t make your eyes watery, then you don’t need this one. It’s too expensive for what it is. I’m still giving it a 4/5 since it did work for me but I just wouldn’t repurchase it.

THIS product legitimately broke out my skin and now I have to fight to get it back. I thought at first it was just the changing products issue but then I started to get like pus filled whiteheads. So, no, I don’t recommend this to anyone. I had such high hopes too.
you use waaayyyy less of your products with these. products last longer, so you’ll save more money.

I will be the first to admit that I’m a product junkie. I recently discovered the KS line and bought some products to try out. I am always skeptical when trying new products because my skin is combo/oily tzone, dry jawline and acne prone.. sigh. Well, moisturizers are usually my worst nightmare, but I have to say, I got this recommendation to use this at night on top of my BP acne treatment (as it can me super drying - the KS acne bac one has 5% BP). Well I put this on over it and it left me skin super soft and not dry at all! It didn’t make me break out. Usually I would stay away from something that says Goats Milk because I would assume it’s for super dry skin, but this worked great for my skin and the dispensing technique of the bottle is genius! You will never get any bacteria in that jar, just great! Totally worth the money as I’m finding that most of Kate’s stuff is worth the money.

This. Oil. Is. Wonderful. I could go on and on, but I’m going to try and keep it short and sweet. This has helped my dehydrated, sensitive skin. The smell is great and makes my skin look just flat it amazing. Plump and glowing to be exact. I’m not exaggerating at all when I say that this works wonders and I’ll never be without it. I can’t wait to try the Orchid and Lapis oil as well!
Yes doesn’t give enough time for exfoliating benefits plus leaves a film on you face after you wash the scrub out. Not my cup of tea.
This cream smells awful. I’ve been using it for two weeks. Wondering if the smell is on my hands. I’ve come to the conclusion that the cream smells awful. Therefore I cannot continue using it.

I drink a lot of green drinks and superfood drinks so I know the taste isn’t always the best.  But this is just not good at all.  I read the reviews before purchasing and I’ve mixed it with water and almond milk.  I can choke it down but I think for the remainder of the container, I will mix with another powder shake.  I will use it to the end because I want to see if there are any benefits in drinking it but I’m not sure that I would purchase again.

Just RIDICULOUSLY overpriced. It doesn’t really hydrate much or make my skin any softer after washing it off- or at least it doesn’t do so enough. The only thing I will say is that this mask is so so cool. It has the smell and consistency of literal honey, then turns white as you rub it in and you get a warm sensation on your face. Experience is 10/10 but results and benefits is 3/10
I bought these about a month before my wedding and they cleared up the tiny bumps I had on my forehead and made my skin smooth and bright for all those photos! I love this product!!!
Personally didn’t notice much of a difference since after finishing the bottle. Think I had better results with just drinking water

I first tried this out as a sample. I use it on my hair and then tried putting a few drops into my moisturizer in the morning and I loved it! I now really use MorrocanOil for my hair, which is also made from Argan Oil, but I keep this strictly for my face since it is a bit pricey.

Purchased this a month ago and have used it almost every day. I really want to love it. It smells amazing and has a nice thick texture, but I end up washing my face again with a different face wash because my face doesn’t feel clean after using it. I will be looking up to see if I’m missing something, and trying for one more week, but right now I just do not love this.

It feels like I’m putting Vaseline on my face, as other reviewers have said. It doesn’t dry either, it just stays slick all day. Definitely not “lightweight.” I don’t know what other people are talking about when they say it has a velvety soft texture. I returned it.

I received this product complimentary from Influenster to review. I enjoy this product but it wasn’t a magic eraser for me. It made my skin break out a bit when I started it but then it calmed down. That’s normal. It feels and seems like a very clinical product. I don’t think I’d purchase it  but I’m enjoying using it.

This is the best makeup remover I’ve ever used, it’s incredible. But it is making me break out a little. The caveat is that this is the first time I’ve used a thick makeup-removing cleanser--I think I was being a bit sloppy with the rinsing at first. I started following-up with a foaming cleanser--hopefully my skin will clear up!
I love it!! However it’s an intense smell. I really thoroughly enjoy the benefits. But my boyfriend can’t stand the smell.

I received this in a sample bag with my purchase and used it for about 3 weeks so there was quite a bit of product in it which surprised me, given it was the mini size (20 ml)! I followed the instructions and used it to remove my eye makeup first (removed with a wet cotton pad). Then I used it to    wash off the rest of my face with a silicone cleansing pad. I found that it cleaned my face but gave no oomph for my combination skin and blemishes. Would recommend this for someone with sensitive or normal skin as this is a very gentle cleanser.
It’s soothing, I use it when my skin gets irritated after using my other acne products....but I wouldn’t say that it get’s rid of the redness dramatically.It’s a good gentle cleanser ,though.

I think I read about this product in Lucky Magazine close to 10 years ago and I have been hooked ever since. I use it every morning and evening on my lips. Every now and then I will use it on hangnails and dry patches on my face and arms. I cannot live without it.

A refreshing treat after applying makeup - or just by itself. I use the travel size to spritz during the day. I live in a desert environment and this is the perfect antidote to dry air in summer or winter.
Love the glow finish it leaves on my skin. Unfortunately it irritated and broke me out all over my forehead and cheeks :( ..

This is magic in a jar. Within a week of using this all of my acne is gone-- and ceased in the middle of serious breakout no less. I have been using this in conjunction with the D-Scar Serum, and together they have worked wonders to stop acne and eliminate the marks each zit has left behind.

I really wanted to love this but after 3 weeks of use I concluded this brand wasn’t meant to be. It feels nice when washing your face and some oil control does occur; However, I noticed little white heads popping up all over my face after a week of use. I thought my skin just needed to adjust but the white heads occurred more in numbers and size. I washed my face 2x a day and followed with toner and moisturizer as instructed but still no positive results.

Finally able to try this lip balm out after waiting for it to restock. It’s a nice lip balm, no frills and unscented. Does an adequate job at moisturizing my lips, however I feel that there are better products currently on the market. It’s definitely not a balm that will absorb; it sort of just  sits atop your lip like a film of butter. Still, it comes attached to a great price tag and does its job keeping my kips from drying out.
I guess this product is really good for dry skin, not for me! If you read the reviews, you will find out this product is not for combination or oily skin type. It broke me out, never absorbed.

This is the first product I’ve purchased based on a sample. The reason? IT SMELLS SO GOOD. Honestly, it’s a good cleanser: gentle, soothing, refreshing, all of that. But I’m the gal who hates to cleanse at night. So lazy, I’ve been using those nasty wipes that tear up your skin. Now -- I’m NOT LYING!!!-- I look forward to cleansing at night because it smells like cucumbers and joy. There are plenty of good cleansers out there, but this one makes me happy. My Pennsylvania Dutch grandmother would be spinning in her grave if she knew I spent 38 bucks on some face wash, but I had a gift card and splurged. The good news is it doesn’t take much product to work up a nice lather so hopefully it will last a long time, and I can continue feeling like Laura Ingalls running through the wildflowers when I wash my face. It’s the little things, people.Also, I’m only 55. Having “over 54“ as the very last age category sure feels pessimistic. Come on, Sephora, I’ve got another 30 or so years of being a beauty ahead of me!

If anything I should’ve known better than to get a vitamin c + e serum not in an amber or dark coloured bottle. There were no improvements in my skin except for breaking out with acne. Glowing skin that is smooth but I don’t think that is needed to help with even skin tone as i used this product both day and night with spf protectant moisturizer and yet my skin tone is still the same. Won’t be buying it again. Please use the VICHY LIFTACTIV VITAMIN C SERUM instead to save you from wasting time and from being disappointed.
it is a light weight cleanser which would work for daily use but not on lots of make up. it works for cleaning daily impurities

A Sephora employee recommended this. I will say it’s a thicker moisturizer (which I like cus I run dry) but it burns like crazy when it gets in ur eye and leaves a white cast you have to rub in well into your skin to get rid of and/or wait 5 mins for it to soak in before putting on makeup. Didn’t hate it and didn’t make me break out. Just not my fav

I really can’t praise these enough, they’re definitely HG status for me. I can never go back to drug store cotton rounds. If you’re on the fence just go for it! It’s so worth it, the cost per pad is barely more expensive than drug store cotton. I also cut mine in half so the packs last longer, and i don’t end up over-saturating and wasting product.

I am very pale with yellow undertones and some redness from accutane. I was looking for a product that would cancel out the redness without much coverage. This product changes from the green to a “skin toned“ shade on your skin. Unfortunately this dried to a very PINK shade and thus enhanced my already red face. When I was outside my face looked like pepto bismol compared to my body.

I got a mini size of this in a beauty box a few months ago. I love Biossance, but am not a huge fan of this eye cream. (For context, I’m 25 with genetic dark circles). I found the consistency similar to the DE eye cream, in that both of them seem too watery in consistency to notice any real changes. I much prefer the Ole Henrikson banana bright eye cream- it is incredibly hydration and gives a notable difference to target dark circles and hydrate undereyes before makeup.
Loved it apply b4 ur make up n bammmm!!!! Love it

y’all.... i cant even tell you how amazing this stuff is. sunday riley, please don’t EVERRRRR remove this from your collection. these two products together literally SAVED my skin and trust me I never had a product in my life save my skin but these really do. yes, the price is high but I promise you it’s sooo worth it. I’m combo skin with dry patches and excessive oiliness on my nose and t zone but these products helped my acne scars, hyper pigmentation, and butterfly rash across my cheeks and nose. I cant wait for her foundation to come out I’m a loyal sunday riley, tatcha, FAB, and dermalogica skin care user.
this eye cream works great- it is lightweight and does not cause your make up to smear. No matter how tired you look it always makes your eyes refreshed!

First I would like to say do not expect a miracle. I really enjoyed this product. I did not have badly stained teeth, just a little bit yellow at the base of my teeth. I started noticing a difference after the third day of using it and family members noticed as well. Though, I’m still not sure it was worth the cash, it is a bit expensive for my liking. Besides the price I did like this product, I tried other methods such as the white strips but nothing compares to the results of the glow.

I have eczema on my face and hands, so I get a lot of texture and scaling. This cleanser gently removes the texture and allows my skin to heal. I only use it once or twice a week and ALWAYS follow up with sunscreen. It’s the best.

I don’t have dry or even dry combo skin like this product says it’s intended for. I actually have oily skin but I bought this to use at night so I could wake up with hydrated balanced skin. So far so good! I only bought it because they got rid of the original dramatically different lotion, which annoyed me. But I didn’t want to get the moisturizing gel because i wanted something super moisturizing for at night. But if you have dry skin I assume you would love it too!
I like YTTP’s products but this one did not do anything for me. I still have 1/3 of the bottle and will finish it but will not be buying again.

I use and love so many Fresh products. Unfortunately, this mask makes no difference to my skin. At times I use it as it is a pleasant placebo of taking care of myself, but the result is at best minimal and at worst drying.

I have been using this product since May 20 and honestly I have not noticed any huge differences in my skin. The packaging is gorgeous however, I don’t really like the gel like consistency because it feels like it isn’t lathering that well onto my skin. I feel as though I could have just bought a drugstore cleanser.

This is the 1st time I’ve used DNA for neck/décolleté but I have used the other DNA products by Dr. Brandt before and love them-all his products I’ve used. I’ve only been using it for a week and can already see more hydration and less of that “crack“ we side-sleepers get. A little goes a long way, spreads easily and absorbs quickly w no sticky residual and I didn’t notice any scent.  Remember it took a long time to get bad, ladies, so why would we think 2 days would work a miracle?! If I could give 1 bit of advice to young women, it would be to use sunscreen and avoid the sun/tanning beds! Take it from a sun worshipper from bye gone days! Those UV/UA rays are the worst thing in the world for your skin, and it will save you THOUSANDS on dollars on remedies when you get older! I purchased the full-size product and will purchase again! For the price, it’s the best thing I’ve used!
This product is perfect for my skin. One of the first cleansers I’ve found that is gentle and doesn’t leave my face irritated. A little goes a long way, so the price is worth it in my opinion.

I really wanted to like this product due to it being black owned. But it really separates on the face throughout the day. I tried using this product six different times to make sure that I made an accurate assessment. However to no avail every time I go out I feel the product coming off my face.

The name of this cleanser is perfect. It is very lightweight and incredibly refreshing. My absolute favourite cleanser to use in the morning, especially since it smells so amazing ! Very bright and fresh. It also has tiny beads that exfoliate but don’t go overboard like some cleansers do. It foams up a lot, which is also great so a little goes a long way, so it doesn’t feel like you are just rubbing a handful of tiny beads on your face. It’s not harsh and it does not leave my face incredible dry afterwards. When using this cleanser and finishing up with the GinZing refreshing moisturiser, my face feels so light, bright, and alive. I don’t have bad acne to begin with, but I’ve learned that I have to change moisturisers regularly or else my face gets used to it and I start to get pimples more frequently. So far I’ve been using this Origins cleanser for about a month and if anything it’s cleared up any pesky pimples that show up within a day or two ! So it’s keeping my skin refreshed and my pores clear and the look of my skin overall has actually evened out, looking very healthy and glowing!I did recieve this product for free to sample from Influenster.

This stuff is absolutely amazing and I now swear by this brand! This is the second product that I used by them, and I had insanely dry elbows that were flaky and hurt to touch. I tried every lotion out there but nothing would touch them. After about a week of using this product my elbows were far more hydrated than they had been in months! This is honestly now my everyday all over lotion, I don’t think I could ever go back to anything else!

I love this cleanser. I use it with my clarisonic mia2 and it’s been quite an amazing experience. Does not leave my skin dried out but at the same time it is squeaky clean. I tried using other stuff with the mia because I almost didn’t want to get used to the fresh cleanser cause of the price. But after trying others, cheaper and some more organic, I find the price is worth it.Please everyone, do yourself a favor and look up clarisonic mia. It’s the same premise as a reg toothbrush vs. a sonic toothbrush. Then invest in a good gentle cleanser like this and you’ll love your skin again.
strongly recommend! smells so great and got rid of all my dry patches on my nose. my skin looks amazing in the morning... only used for about a week before i got noticeable results

The serum I got was dark amber colored. I knew that indicated it was bad so I tried to return it. I’ve used exfoliants for triple the price, and this one works one very well. It’s very refreshing and I will purchase it agian.

This is my #1 moisturizer. I bought the huge tube of it because my skin is super sensitive, prone to acne, and it can go from super oily to super dry based off the seasons. My skin is very sensitive and oily. I use this about twice a week and have noticed huge changes in my skin. It is smoother, softer and more radiant. I break out every once and a while and I am sometimes left with dry skin after a breakout, this product evens out my skin so much I absolutely love it.
The minute I tried this i fell in love! I love the thick texture and how it warms up in your hands. This really soothes my skin and helps with any breakouts i have. It also smells really good!

This thing completely messed up my skin. Ive used this moisturizer for about a month and I have breakouts all over my face. I haven’t had breakouts like this since I was in high school. Very disappointed. Also, this moisturizer is a cream, but I didn’t feel like it offered that much hydration. I’m reverting back to my gel-cream/gel formulas and hopefully I can get this acne under control in the coming weeks.
A nice, thick, but not sticky lip balm that moisturizes for hours. Great! Love it in a tube rather than the tin.

I have only used this product for 10 days or so but I am pleased with the results so far. Lovely product but just too expensive for what it is. Very hard to justify.

I love this gel wash! cleans my face compeletly and washes off all of my makeup without making my skin feel tight, Has a light scent to it which doesnt bother me in the slightest. This is truly a must have! I received a deluxe sample of this with my last on-line order and I absolutely LOVE this stuff. it’s a great non-drying acne moisturizer. it helps slowly with healing my breakouts. the smell is not that good though. but with the affordable price, i’ll definitely buy again.

i love this cream, indeed it makes my face so soft and hydrated, but its a little bit too rich for me, it leaves my face a bit sticky. i might have to use it only at night.

I have combo/oily skin and I’m 45. I was not expecting much and was afraid to even try this BUT I AM SO GLAD I DID!!! I’ve been using this since January. My dark spots did fade a bit, but only after like 2 months. I was hoping for faster results but didn’t see anything different until recently. Here we go, first I would like to start by saying I received this 7 day trial completely free on Influenster... with that being said the consistency is great it’s not too oily or sticky it’s semi lightweight as well, once applied to the face it takes about 30secs before is absorbs into the skin, it leaves your skin feeling smooth and looking radiant, it does not leave a oily finish which I love and it does not feel like it is clogging your pores which is always a plus... I don’t think it make my skin look any younger but it did make it smoother so that’s always a good thing so overall it’s a great product and I love it.

I love the color and how nicely it goes on, but it comes off SO easily. If I layer foundation on top, it almost pills off of my skin in little rolls. It looks fine with no foundation, but it rubs off really easily so you need to be careful what comes near your face.

Did absolutely nothing for my skin. I have dry skin and this didn’t hydrate or make my skin dewy whatsoever. It’s just like spraying water on my face.

Lightweight but super hydration and nourishing. I ran to a store to get more when I ran out. I mix this with C-Firma for my morning skincare and absolutely love it.

These stickers have saved me so many times now. Instantly hydrating! Great for dry skin in the winter! Will repurchase.

Gentle, smells delightful, and leaves my oily skin feeling clean but still soft. I have tried a bunch of other gentle cleansers trying to find a replacement, since this is so expensive for a product that you wash off, but none of them are quite as nice.
