At first I was like this is a bit out of the ordinary for a sheet mask, why not just put the serum on the mask itself? But once I opened the ampoule I quickly learned why. This patented sheet mask definitely stays in place better than other sheet masks! This mask was provided complimentary via Influenster.
Feels good going on my skin. Removed all my makeup and left my skin feeling moisturized. It also melted into my skin almost instantly. This is my 1st step when double cleansing.

Does the job. Not a strong smell. Would be good over a base tan. Best reaults use twice.  Overall i wouldnt purchase over other products but it definitely works and not streaky. Oh this is also great on hands and feet!!

Felt the difference after one use.  I love masks and try to do masking 2 to 3 times a week, I have tried many sheet masks and other liquid applied.  This two step process really worked for me.  Got me clean and fresh, I have combo skin and am 40, so aging...booo. I used it on a day I went make up free all day and felt my skin was at it’s best after.  Totally worth $9!

I use this during my daytime and nighttime skin care routine. When I wake up my lips feel soft and hydrated thanks to the rose flower oil in it. And the smell? Heavenly! I am obsessed with the fresh scent of rose. You can tell that quality ingredients were used in this product. My only complaint is it’s a little bit pricey for the average everyday person.

This Daily Microfoliant Exfoliator did wonders for my skin. It leaves it feeling silky smooth and hydrated. Some exfoliators can make my skin feel tight and dry, but this one definitely did not. Super easy to use and gentle yet effective. I can’t wait to try more products from Dermalogica. I recommend this for anyone - dry, oily, combo, sensitive.

I received this product for free from Influenster. I really like the packaging it’s simple but cute. I like the pump, it is way nicer and does not make a mess like some other products. I felt like this product was sticky however one if the main ingredients is nordic birch sap. As I waited the 15 mins to remove this mask my face was feeling tighter and the mask was turning clear which was pretty neat. It was easy to clean off my face feels tighter, brighter and fresh. I also realized my pores do seem smaller which is awesome! I am really loving this product and I do recommend purchasing this item
I really love it is really work it’s good for me and my skin to try it out and use it I really do like it

Love this serum my skin has been feeling superSoft I don’t have any wrinkles but I’m using before I do hahaha love that it’s sitting well On my skin received for free for testing purposes and now have incorporated in my skin care routine

So surprised at how well this worked! I have rosacea like skin and it basically covered all the redness on my cheeks. The only negative was I felt like it took awhile to soak in and during that time I looked a little oily (I have pretty normal skin)

Talk about HYDRATION! I have combination skin and some areas are dry but I absolutely loved this mask! The only qualm would maybe be the price point in the long run, but it definitely hydrates and makes your face feel supple. I received this item complimentary from Influenster.
Every Laneige lip product I have bought I have loved, this one is just as awesome. If you have dry lips this will seriously be your saving grace.

Favorite sunscreen to wear under makeup. It acts as a primer so I am getting sun protection and an awesome primer in one! If you like a silicone feeling primer, you will LOVE the unseen sunscreen. Best part....no white cast! Also doesn’t leave your skin feeling oily like some sunscreens do.

I am really impressed with this toner so far. I have been sick with a nasty cold and my skin has been terrible. After only three days of using this my breakouts and texture were much improved. Excited to see long-term results!

I use products with retinol because it is good for the appearance of wrinkles, fine lines and overall smoothening of the skin. I was using this to turn my foundation into skin tint. It works but something about this polyglutamic acid dulls the glow of the foundation. It does feel good on the skin and makes the skin look good just very matte

I love this Urban Environment Fresh-Moisture Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42 by Shiseido, the scent is light not like other sunscreens that irritate my eyes because of how strong the scent is, I like that absorbs fast and doesn’t leave a greasy feeling or residues, perfect to wear under makeup, sunscreen is always a good part my skincare routine and I am so happy I was able to find this one!

I was very happy with my purchase and would definitely recommend this. The packaging is very nice and it comes with a protective covering inside which I appreciate. I received this product complimentary from Bobbi Brown. This product is really moisturizing to the under eyes and the packaging is very high quality. I haven’t tried the regular Face Base so I don’t know if they feel the same but I love the Eye Base. It leaves your under eyes feeling refreshed and hydrated. This is my honest review because I’ve never tried a Bobbi Brown product before but honestly it’s an amazing product. If your thinking about buying this product I totally recommend it!

I LOVE this Vit C serum! It’s one of the few I’ve repurchased and I plan on buying more. I love the way it smells and how silky it feels on the skin. I’ve noticed my sun spots and my skin texture absolutely look better after using this for a few weeks. A single pump is good enough for my whole face and a bottle lasts me a few months of nightly use.
I love this product. The cream is so soft and leaves my face looking healthy and moisturized.

Excellent product. It left my skin feeling plump and refreshed after each use. It does not have a sticky or tacky feeling after application like many other products I have recently tried do. Love this product. I suggest to start with just 2 drops in your moisturizer when you try it for the first time. And don’t forget to wash your hands after !!!!

I received this product from Influenster for free for my honest review. I love the size of this NuFace mini. It’s so easy to travel with and the charge stays for a long time (I haven’t had to charge it yet) I waited to review because I wanted to give it some time to see how it would work. After the first use, I could see a slight lift on one side if I looked really carefully. After using it everyday for a week I could really see a difference. Being that I’m almost 50, I didn’t know if anything could help my smile lines …but it did. It’s not magic but it definitely smoothed them out a bit. My overall face looked lifted and smooth. Now, using it wasn’t always fun. I did not like the gel and would wash it off after each use, which made it a nuisance. So I eventually switched to my own hyaluronic acid and it worked well. Every now and then I would get a tingle from the currents but nothing awful. I gave it 4 stars because I wish we didn’t have to use a gel with it, which would make it easier to use. But without a gel, the tingles were not pleasant. Also, I stopped using it and after about 4 days my face returned to it’s original texture. I will continue to see if linger usage will give me more days in between, before I need to use again. Bottom line: It does work if you are consistent but it does take some commitment.
